input_summary.subtask: Explain the concept of an 'inactive journey' in Adobe Journey Optimizer context.

output.answer_preview: In Adobe Journey Optimizer, an inactive journey refers to a journey that is not currently processing any messages or interacting with customers. This state typically occurs when a journey has been paused, stopped, or has completed its execution without any active audience segments triggering it. An inactive journey does not consume resources for real-time decisioning or message delivery, though its configuration and history remain stored for potential reactivation or analysis.
